final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (load) begin
        q <= data_in;
    end else begin
        q <= q >> 1;
    end
end

endmodule
